statements.__comment: Project `_ont_enabled` on every EntraApplication from the linked EntraServicePrincipal. Microsoft Graph exposes `accountEnabled` on the service principal (the tenant-local instance) rather than on the application registration. OPTIONAL MATCH guarantees every application is touched: when an app has no service principal (e.g. the SP was just deleted by cleanup), `_ont_enabled` is reset to NULL so stale values from prior syncs cannot linger.
statements.query: MATCH (app:EntraApplication) OPTIONAL MATCH (app)-[:SERVICE_PRINCIPAL]->(sp:EntraServicePrincipal) WITH app, sp SET app._ont_enabled = sp.account_enabled
